name: grill-adapter
description: Host-agnostic coding adapter with governed Obsidian atomic Notes, Lanhu requirements intake, and source-of-truth verification for grill or plain Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Add governed project knowledge and requirements intake to coding workflows
interface.longDescription: Adds governed Obsidian atomic Notes and Skill Cards through Disclose, Carry, Bind, and Capture, plus Lanhu intake, source-of-truth verification, hooks, migration, and resumable GitHub draft-PR publishing without patching the host workflow.
defaultPrompt: Research the project wiki before planning this change.
Bind the selected wiki constraints before implementation.
Review durable knowledge from this completed change.
